results.description: Happy Path: Food matching, Dharavi, no ration card
results.input: I need tiffin near Dharavi, I don't have a ration card
results.response_text:
Here are the verified resources that match your needs:

- **SNEHA Nutrition Program — Dharavi** (ID: FS-003)
  *Service:* SNEHA (Society for Nutrition Education and Health Action) runs community nutrition and food security programs in Dharavi and Sion for women, children and low-income families.
  *Hours:* Mon-Sat, 10:00-18:00
  *Note:* Please confirm eligibility (e.g. ration card status or income) directly with the organization.

- **Robin Hood Army Mumbai** (ID: FS-002)
  *Service:* Volunteer-run surplus food redistribution from restaurants to families in need across Mumbai. Zero-funds, no monetary donations accepted.
  *Hours:* Weekend distributions primarily — contact for schedule


This is informational, not legal or financial advice. Details may have changed — please confirm directly with the organization before visiting.

results.description: Happy Path: Rent/Utility support, Govandi, BPL card

results.response_text:
Here are the verified resources that match your needs:

- **MSEDCL BPL Electricity Subsidy — Maharashtra** (ID: RU-001)
  *Service:* Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company provides subsidized electricity rates and hardship waivers for BPL/AAY card holders. For disconnection issues contact the 24x7 helpline.
  *Hours:* 24x7 helpline. Office hours Mon-Sat 10:00-17:00
  *Note:* Please confirm eligibility (e.g. ration card status or income) directly with the organization.

- **MHADA Tenant Grievance Cell — Mumbai Board** (ID: RU-006)
  *Service:* Maharashtra Housing and Area Development Authority (MHADA) Mumbai Board handles grievances for tenants in MHADA/SRA colonies facing illegal eviction, rent disputes, or redevelopment issues.
  *Hours:* Mon-Fri, 10:00-17:00

results.description: Happy Path: Devanagari Hindi crisis redirect
results.input: आज रात हमारा घर जा सकता है, मदद करो
results.response_text: यदि आप तत्काल खतरे में हैं, आज रात बेघर होने का सामना कर रहे हैं, या जीवन-संकट में हैं, तो कृपया तुरंत 100 (पुलिस) या 108 (एम्बुलेंस) डायल करें। मानसिक स्वास्थ्य सहायता के लिए टेली-मानस हेल्पलाइन 14416 पर कॉल करें — यह 24/7 निःशुल्क सेवा है।

results.description: Happy Path: English crisis redirect
results.input: we might lose our home tonight, please help
results.response_text: If you are in immediate danger, facing eviction tonight, or in a life-threatening crisis, please contact emergency services immediately by dialing 100 (Police) or 108 (Ambulance). For free, confidential mental health support, you can also call Tele-MANAS at 14416, India's 24/7 government mental health helpline.
